Trending carnival

Chaos by design: dozens of vivid product photos compete for your attention.

This fixture imitates the feeling of a flashy marketplace homepage while staying deterministic enough for image-based regression tests.

When the correct preview tile is matched, this panel updates with the opened article summary.

Why this page feels noisy

  • Mixed categories next to each other
  • Large promo banners and bright chips
  • Repeated tile shapes and card structure
  • Many image-heavy preview areas competing for attention
